since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.58%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.46% · Gold +0.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.58%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.58%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -11.24%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.57%, APP +8.97%, META +8.76%, AVAV +8.10%, PLTR +7.48%. Laggards: MU -11.24%, TER -10.95%, KLAC -10.87%, MRVL -9.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.64% at $157.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
